name: callisto-php/sdk
description: Official Callisto Signal API SDK for PHP

suggest.laravel/framework: Auto-wires error reporting in Laravel via Callisto\Sdk\Framework\Laravel\CallistoServiceProvider (auto-discovered).
suggest.bowphp/framework: Enables the BowPHP error-handler reporter Callisto\Sdk\Framework\Bowphp\CallistoErrorHandler (wired via config/app.php error_handle).
